title: caryospermum alpestre
intro: Caryospermum alpestre, also known as Himalayan sweet cicely, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Caryospermum alpestre include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Caryospermum alpestre can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
